changes: Improved sidebar section status dots with 3-state indicators and group dividers

Improved action icon hit targets and hover states

Fixed contrast issues across section headers and table elements

Added collapsible sidebar navigation (desktop)
Added delete confirmation dialog to prevent accidental data loss
Made full table rows clickable with smooth hover transition
Replaced absolute dates with relative timestamps (hover for full date)
Added sortable Client, Created, and Updated columns
Added visual separator between safe actions and delete button
Added 5-second undo window after deleting a checklist
Improved column headers with uppercase, spaced styling
Added Status column placeholder for future completion tracking
Updated brand teal (#007A6A) across all UI — passes WCAG AA
Moved slug to secondary line under client name
Added footer with row count and app version
Improved empty states with icon and contextual messaging
Search input hidden until 8+ checklists exist
Upgraded card shadow and page title size
Added AI call voice selection toggle per checklist

Added About tab with version history
Added per-field sample column and pinned sample row to all sheets
Reverted SSL config to fix managed DB connection on Vercel
Applied Talkpush Design System brand tokens and color cleanup
Merged Read Me tab into Welcome tab

Added progress bar, tooltips, placeholders, and UX polish
Improved table row hover, detail panel labels, and input visibility
Security hardening, performance improvements, and Supabase storage prep
Added Company Details, Facebook, and Branding fields to Company Information
Added file upload for branding assets using Supabase Storage
Added expandable row detail for compact table UX

Initial production deployment with 14-tab configuration checklist
Admin dashboard with checklist management and Excel import/export
